title: post_api_auth_login_returns_tokens_in_standard_envelope
description: MANDATORY credentials: email=admin@ceialmilk.com password=password. Assert HTTP 200 and tokens ONLY in response.data.access_token and response.data.refresh_token (never root access/refresh).

title: post_api_v1_partos_creates_parto_with_crias_in_single_transaction
description: Use login from TC001 only (admin@ceialmilk.com/password). Bearer token must be response.data.access_token. Create prerequisites and call POST /api/v1/partos with numero_crias and crias[]. Assert HTTP 201 envelope and parto id in response.data.id.

title: get_api_v1_partos_and_get_by_id_return_created_record
description: After creating a parto with valid seed credentials, validate GET /api/v1/partos?fazenda_id=... returns record in response.data[] and GET /api/v1/partos/:id returns same id in response.data.id.

title: put_api_v1_partos_updates_parto_fields_and_validates_domain
description: Create parto then PUT /api/v1/partos/:id with full payload (animal_id, fazenda_id, data, tipo, numero_crias...). Assert HTTP 200 and updated response.data. For numero_crias=0, current behavior is fallback to 1 with HTTP 200 (do not assert 400).

title: delete_api_v1_partos_removes_parto_and_generated_animais
description: Create parto with cria VIVO + animal_identificacao explicit. After DELETE /api/v1/partos/:id, assert GET by id is 404 and GET /api/v1/animais?fazenda_id no longer contains that animal_identificacao.

title: post_api_v1_crias_on_existing_parto_supports_edit_flow_completion
description: With seed credentials, create parto and then register cria via POST /api/v1/crias using payload {parto_id, sexo, condicao}. Assert HTTP 201 and GET /api/v1/crias?parto_id returns response.data[] with at least one item.
